hypothesis: Concrete eBPF Bytecode Modification:** Modify the eBPF program attached to the data-ingestion tracepoint by replacing static block-size immediate values with dynamic loads from a BPF per-CPU array map. Specifically, insert `BPF_ALU64_REG` and `BPF_MUL` instructions to calculate the EWMA of pre-sorted run lengths ($v_t$). Use this calculated $v_t$ to dynamically set the register controlling the loop unrolling depth for SIMD block moves (`b_size`), restricting the memory access window to strictly fit within the L1 cache boundary.
